privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: My Bank is a children's financial education app. This policy describes how we collect, use, and protect personal data, in compliance with Brazil's General Data Protection Law (LGPD - Law 13,709/2018) and the EU General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR - EU 2016/679).
privacy.dataCollectedFamily: Family data: bank name, parent's email, selected currency and language.
privacy.dataCollectedChildren: Children's data: name, avatar, date of birth (optional), virtual balance.
privacy.dataCollectedFinancial: Financial data: virtual transactions (deposits, withdrawals), schedules, educational contracts.
privacy.dataCollectedDevices: Device data: identifier for secure authentication (passkey), app preferences.
privacy.purposeText: Data is processed exclusively for children's financial education purposes, enabling parents to teach money concepts, savings, and financial responsibility in a fun and safe way.
privacy.legalBasisText: Data processing is based on parental consent (LGPD Art. 14 / GDPR Art. 8), which is obtained during the account setup process.
privacy.parentalConsentText: My Bank processes children's data only with the express authorization of their legal guardian. The parent creates the account, registers children, and controls all app features. No minor's data is collected without the parent's active participation.
privacy.retentionText: Personal data is retained while the family account is active. When you delete the account, all data is permanently removed from our servers, including children's data, transactions, contracts, and settings.
privacy.rightsAccess: Access: You can view all your data through the app.
privacy.rightsCorrection: Correction: Edit name, avatar, and settings directly in the app.
privacy.rightsDeletion: Deletion: Delete your account at any time in the parent settings area.
privacy.rightsPortability: Portability: Request data export via email.
privacy.rightsRevocation: Revocation: Revoke consent by deleting your account.
privacy.securityText: We use encryption in transit (HTTPS/TLS), secure credential storage (SecureStore), JWT tokens for authentication, bcrypt password hashing, and biometric authentication (passkey/WebAuthn) to protect your data.
privacy.contactText: For privacy questions or to exercise your rights, contact us at: privacy@omeubanco.app
privacy.childrenText: This app is specifically designed for use by children under the supervision of their legal guardians. We fully comply with the special requirements of LGPD (Art. 14) and GDPR (Art. 8) regarding the processing of minors' data, ensuring all processing occurs with verifiable parental consent.
